{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"2026032121241217269E82FED79DFE1391\"}"},"total":2},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7293358586410582836","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"故事还不错，有内核，特别喜欢里面的打斗场面，挺过瘾的。文笔也还行，尤为喜欢里面穿插的景物天气之类的描写，简练而又恰到好处，为文章增色不少。貌似这是作者大大的第一本书，支持下，会一直看下去的。认真写，开局还不错，希望能保持下去。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1698119091,"group_id":"7282954486589443134","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"偷得浮生半日闲","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9H/mJp7hRIEs5xJ4xSFTrs7A64+JnYy9x8JzckS+KhR","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"1908403383046600","user_name":"三千繁华客"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1908403383046600","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7282954486589443134","book_info":{"abstract":"《单女主》穿越仙侠世界，化身倔强持剑少年，这一生他要活出无限精彩，这一世他要斩个朗朗未来。面对爱憎悔，伤别离，他又将何去何从？一起走入陈海生的仙侠人生，看少年执剑，叹美人如画。读奇闻异事，画一世天涯。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2of485828e603d722be5f1b8320cc9a6ee~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"乃何人","author_id":"","book_id":"7282954486589443134","book_name":"幻想仙侠传","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d0d0d0","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":1140,\"name\":\"东方仙侠\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1140\u0026name=东方仙侠\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":7,\"name\":\"玄幻\",\"schema\":\"drag
